actionUnits.condition: Physics trigger entry for AttachToElevator.OnTriggerEnter (MonoBehaviour id: 397541585, script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Preconditions needed: (1) BoxCollider id 397541586 must have m_IsTrigger = 1 (currently 0), (2) the entering object (Player) must have a Rigidbody, (3) Assign a valid Player GameObject to MonoBehaviour.player (currently null), and (4) Code likely has a logic bug: it checks `if (gameObject == player)` instead of `if (other.gameObject == player)`, so even if the trigger fires, the parenting code will not run unless fixed. Expected behavior after fix: when Player enters platform2's trigger, Player becomes a child of platform2 (SetParent with worldPositionStays = true).

Physics trigger exit for AttachToElevator.OnTriggerExit (MonoBehaviour id: 397541585, script guid: 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77). Preconditions needed: same as entry case; ensure Player had previously entered and been parented. Expected behavior after fix: when Player exits platform2's trigger, Player.transform.parent is set to null (detached).
